Please understand we do NOT know the EXACT ‚ÄúDAY‚Äù or ‚ÄúHOUR‚Äù of Jesus Christ‚Äôs return on our Gregorian calendar.
The Countdown Clock is set for the Feast of Trumpets AD , which is the time period when Christ‚Äôs return will be ‚Äúright at the doors‚Äù (Matthew :).
The Feast of Trumpets (Rosh Hashanah) is a yearly celebrated Holy Day known to the Jews as the day ‚Äúno man knows the day or hour‚Äù since it cannot be confirmed until two witnesses in Jerusalem see the first sliver of the new moon.
THIS is the ‚Äútime‚Äù during AD (Earth‚Äôs th year) when Jesus Christ will rapturously return to planet Earth!!!
In this part prophetic seminar Gabriel Ansley Erb reveals the amazing prophetic truths in God‚Äôs Word (Bible) confirming Jesus Christ‚Äôs return Feast of Trumpets AD .

But Raikkonen remains sceptical about Lotus‚Äôs pace.
‚ÄúI knew the gap was quite big still and we don‚Äôt have that speed right now,‚Äù he said.
‚ÄúSecond is not too bad, it is the best I can gain with the team.
I‚Äôd rather be in first place, but we didn‚Äôt have the speed.
Championship leader Sebastian Vettel and McLaren‚Äôs Jenson Button chose to sit out the pole battle and run medium tyres in Q, hoping for a race strategy advantage.
Raikkonen was confident Lotus‚Äôs tactics were right.

(Trinidad Guardian) It has been days since Gan¬≠gad¬≠har Hanooman, , has been miss¬≠ing and rel¬≠a¬≠tives in re¬≠new¬≠ing their calls for help in find¬≠ing him, have al¬≠so called on Po¬≠lice Com¬≠mis¬≠sion¬≠er Gary Grif¬≠fith for a ‚Äúper¬≠son¬≠al‚Äù in¬≠ter¬≠ven¬≠tion in the in¬≠ves¬≠ti¬≠ga¬≠tions sur¬≠round¬≠ing the case.
Hanooman of Roys¬≠to¬≠nia, Cou¬≠va, was last seen on Sep¬≠tem¬≠ber at about .
pm near a mi¬≠ni mart close to his home in Roys¬≠to¬≠nia in Cou¬≠va.
His car‚Äîa sil¬≠ver Nis¬≠san B‚Äîwas found aban¬≠doned near a man¬≠grove ad¬≠ja¬≠cent to two veg¬≠etable gar¬≠dens in Fe¬≠lic¬≠i¬≠ty, Ch¬≠agua¬≠nas two days af¬≠ter on Sep¬≠tem¬≠ber .
The car was found by a search par¬≠ty or¬≠gan¬≠ised by fam¬≠i¬≠ly mem¬≠bers who act¬≠ed on spir¬≠i¬≠tu¬≠al guid¬≠ance giv¬≠en to them by a pun¬≠dit (a Hin¬≠du leader).
Speak¬≠ing with the Guardian, Gan¬≠gad¬≠har‚Äôs wife, who was too scared to give her name or be pho¬≠tographed, said she re¬≠mains hope¬≠ful that her hus¬≠band will re¬≠turn to her.
She be¬≠lieves that some¬≠thing ter¬≠ri¬≠bly went wrong that day as she was told ‚Äústrange things‚Äù maybe ‚Äúclues,‚Äù ‚ÄúHe went by a broth¬≠er of his and I had called him and told him to stop and buy some veg¬≠eta¬≠bles when he was com¬≠ing home.
About .
pm I called him and asked him where he was.
‚ÄúThen af¬≠ter a while, I called him and asked him where he was and he told me to call his broth¬≠er that his car get stick up,‚Äù she added.
An¬≠oth¬≠er rel¬≠a¬≠tive fur¬≠ther ex¬≠plained that many times be¬≠fore in con¬≠ver¬≠sa¬≠tion, Gan¬≠gad¬≠har, when talk¬≠ing about crimes would not say the word ‚Äúhi¬≠jack‚Äù but would say ‚Äústick up‚Äù which she said meant some¬≠one be¬≠ing hi¬≠jacked or hi¬≠jack¬≠ing.
‚ÄúSo‚Ä¶think¬≠ing about it that could have been an¬≠oth¬≠er clue that he was try¬≠ing to give, maybe?‚Äù the rel¬≠a¬≠tive said.
It is said that dur¬≠ing a call to Gan¬≠gad¬≠har‚Äôs cell¬≠phone on one oc¬≠ca¬≠sion that night, male voic¬≠es were heard in the back¬≠ground as though a quar¬≠rel was go¬≠ing on at the time.
There was al¬≠so mu¬≠sic heard play¬≠ing be¬≠lieved to be com¬≠ing from the car‚Äôs ra¬≠dio.
In that call, Gan¬≠gad¬≠har did not say any¬≠thing.
The phone sud¬≠den¬≠ly hung up and calls af¬≠ter that went straight to the voice mail record¬≠ing.
Gan¬≠gad¬≠har‚Äôs car, which was sub¬≠se¬≠quent¬≠ly im¬≠pound¬≠ed at the Ch¬≠agua¬≠nas Po¬≠lice Sta¬≠tion, was re¬≠cent¬≠ly re¬≠leased to the fam¬≠i¬≠ly and is now parked up in Gan¬≠gad¬≠har‚Äôs back¬≠yard.
With sad¬≠ness in her eyes, oc¬≠ca¬≠sion¬≠al¬≠ly ‚Äúdrift¬≠ing‚Äù in her thoughts, Gan¬≠gad¬≠har‚Äôs wife for eight years stood next to her hus¬≠band‚Äôs car in dis¬≠may dur¬≠ing an in¬≠ter¬≠view with the Guardian.
An¬≠oth¬≠er rel¬≠a¬≠tive said she strong¬≠ly be¬≠lieves that in¬≠ves¬≠ti¬≠gat¬≠ing of¬≠fi¬≠cers at the An¬≠ti-Kid¬≠nap¬≠ping Squad could do more in their at¬≠tempts to find Gan¬≠gad¬≠har.
‚ÄúHe went miss¬≠ing two days be¬≠fore Na¬≠tal¬≠ie Pol¬≠lon¬≠ais and they were able to use all the tech¬≠nol¬≠o¬≠gy to find her, why they couldn‚Äôt use that same pro¬≠ce¬≠dure to find him?‚Äù
Any¬≠one with in¬≠for¬≠ma¬≠tion on his where¬≠abouts or oth¬≠er in¬≠for¬≠ma¬≠tion con¬≠cern¬≠ing his dis¬≠ap¬≠pear¬≠ance can con¬≠tact the po¬≠lice at , TIPS or the near¬≠est po¬≠lice sta¬≠tion.

Ms Access to MySQL database converter toolkit migrate data tables accurately and reliably.
Application utility converts data attributes as well as structures of database tables.
Software tool accurately migrates database properties includes Primary keys, constraints, indexes and null values of database system for converting them into destination data tables format.
Conversion software tool supports database integrity and Unicode architecture with multi byte character sets.
Program tool easily configured with mixed or windows authenticated mode of database system.
Database converter automate migrates Ms Access to MySQL no need to manually create a new database.
Utility have attractive user graphical wizard that helps users to handling all conversion operations.
Software efficiently supports Windows Windows ME Windows Windows NT Windows Server Windows XP Windows VISTA operating system.
* Ms Access to MySQL database conversion toolkit converts Microsoft Access to MySQL.
* Utility converts data tables either partially selective or whole selective.
* Software tool saves resulted data as update data tables or save as new tables.
* Conversion software full automated tool that converts indexes and keys relations values.
* Conversion tool supports Unicode architecture.
* Migration tool supports safe data conversion and maintains database integrity.
* Software supports mixed mode and windows mode authentication.
download by Sobolsoft Search for and replace data (characters) in your Microsoft Access database tables.
You decide which tables to make replacements in.
Replacements are not made in special cases such as booleans (True/False) and primary keys.

On the morning after their Dockville festival show we meet the Danish band Rangleklods at their hotel close to Au√üenalster.
At the waterfront Esben and his bandmate Tikki are welcomed by a duck that will keep close to the two musicians during the whole acoustic session.
Rangleklods make themselves comfortable in a knobby tree, where Esben starts into the sombrous and stirring ‚ÄúIn Charge‚Äù.
Tikki adds some extra deepness to Esben‚Äôs sonorous singing.
Rangleklods‚Äô stripped down performance is so full of atmosphere, it makes you nearly forget that this band turns very electronic and clubby on stage.
